audit_items.proof_trace: The property asserts a NULL-check on the return value of ur_addr_map_init(), but the function is declared void — it has no return value. The function initializes a caller-provided map pointer in-place and guards with an internal if(map) check (L804), making NULL input safe. All map-consuming functions (ur_addr_map_get, ur_addr_map_put) also validate via ur_addr_map_valid(map) which subsumes a NULL check, so no dereference of an uninitialized or NULL map occurs on any reachable path.
